metadata.central_concept: An extract from eggplant called BEC5 has a 100% success rate curing non-melanoma skin cancers with zero recurrence over 26 years and 80,000 patients. This has been covered up because it threatens the pocketbooks of pharmaceutical firms, dermatology clinics, and plastic surgeons. Dr. Jonathan Wright, winner of natural medicine's Lifetime Achievement Award, reveals this and dozens of other suppressed natural cures.

s_specific_solution.core_mechanism: BEC5 Eggplant Extract: BEC5 is an extract from eggplant that selectively targets and destroys cancer cells while leaving healthy cells completely unaffected. With microscopic precision, it selects and eliminates only cancer cells. The compound triggers apoptosis (programmed cell death) in cancer cells only.
mechanism_proof_points: Microscopic analysis confirms death of all cancer cells
unique_differentiators: 100% success rate with zero return of cancer - covered up because it threatens pharmaceutical firms, dermatology clinics, and plastic surgeons

headline.vsl_adaptation: Would you believe that an extract from eggplant could cure - that's cure, not just improve - the majority of non-melanoma skin cancers (squamous and basal cell cancers), usually in three months or less? What I'm about to share with you has never been revealed quite this way before. Pay close attention because this changes everything...

lead.full_text: Would you believe that an extract from eggplant could cure - that's cure, not just improve - the majority of non-melanoma skin cancers (squamous and basal cell cancers), usually in three months or less? This may seem like an outrageous claim, but researchers have known about these incredible results for over 20 years! It might have remained a secret for another two decades if award-winning doctor Jonathan Wright, M.D. hadn't published the research - and dared tell the truth: It's a cure!

root_cause.what_they_think_problem_is: Cancer is difficult to treat and requires expensive medical interventions
root_cause.what_real_problem_is: Suppressed natural cure that works 100% of the time but can't be patented for profit
root_cause.why_nothing_worked: Profitable treatments are promoted while cheap, effective natural cures are hidden

mechanism_scoring.notes: Exceptionally strong mechanism with perfect specificity (BEC5), extreme novelty (eggplant cures cancer), and powerful villain (Big Pharma conspiracy). High believability supported by Royal London Hospital study and 80,000 patient track record. Scientific legitimacy anchored by Dr. Wright's credentials and peer-reviewed research.

e_level_classification.reasoning: Revolutionary mechanism that reframes the entire cancer treatment paradigm. Claims 100% cure rate with natural substance, directly challenges medical establishment, creates new category (suppressed natural cures). Not quite E5 as it doesn't completely redefine the problem space, but very close with conspiracy frame elevating it.
sophistication_indicators: Cannot be patented creates unique positioning
